summary: This document outlines the Risk Management Plan for KeepMeCompany's AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform, establishing safety policies based on ISO 14971 standards. It defines criteria for risk acceptability, severity of harm, and probability of occurrence to ensure medical device safety and regulatory compliance. The plan integrates risk management activities into the software development lifecycle to mitigate potential hazards.
